raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a billing dispute with Citi ( Case XXXX ). Citi requested documentation, which I emailed on time to XXXX on multiple dates ( XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/year> ). I have proof of delivery with attachments. 

Citi closed the dispute stating they never received my documents and now refuses to re-open the case, despite evidence that I complied with their request. This is an internal handling error on XXXX side, not customer inaction. 

Im requesting Citi review my case again and reopen the dispute under the Fair Credit Billing Act.
